Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's DEMURRER TO PLAINTFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Defendant San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit District's demurrer to all three causes of action alleged in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Reedie Powell is sustained as to all three causes of action without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Continued To Aug-08-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Daniel R. Del Rio of Del Rio & Associates, Tel. No. 1-916-378-4705 Moving party by telephone appearance;
Reedie Powell, Plaintiff also present in court.

RULING - Hearing was sealed by the court. The Del Rio & Associates' Motion to be relieved as counsel for the PLAINTIFF REEDIE POWELL - The court encouraged the parties to work together in good faith. Mr. Del Rio to file the Amended Complaint and take care of the CMC which is on calendar for June 20, 2018. If the parties are unable to work together in good faith, Mr. Del Rio can submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

Notice Of And Motion Of Plaintiff Reddie Powell For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Daniel R. Del Rio of Del Rio & Associates, Tel. No. 1-916-378-4705 appearing
for the Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
Reedie Powell, Plaintiff also present in court.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Reedie Powell's motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is granted. Defendant BART has not identified any legal prejudice it would suffer by the granting of the motion and doing so comports with California's liberal policy of allowing amendments to pleadings. Ms. Powell has leave to file her first amended complaint no later than June 6, 2018. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =3022/hk

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Reedie Powell (no phone number) Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEL RIO & CARICHOFF, P.C., DANEIL DEL RIO'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNEL.

Continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:30 am per request of the moving party by email and approval of the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Donald P. Eichhorn, Esq. of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP, T:415.433.0990, for defendant/moving party, on Court Call;
Daniel R. Del Rio, Esq. of Del Rio & Associate PC, T:916.378.4705, for plaintiff, on Court Call.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel requested clarification on the tentative ruling. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as follows:
